Set as default Markdown viewer?
Double-click any .md file to open it directly in Covalent.

Keyboard Shortcuts

General
Open file⌘/Ctrl O
New window⌘/Ctrl N
Print / Save PDF⌘/Ctrl P
Find⌘/Ctrl F
Toggle themet
Show shortcuts?
Navigation
Scroll down / upj k
Half page down / upd e
Scroll left / righth l
Go to top / bottomg G
Find
Open find⌘/Ctrl F /
Next matchEnter
Previous match⇧ Enter
Close findEsc
